name: Language Learning Starter Kit
description: Reusable foundation for building quiz/learning apps with auth, gamification, and progress tracking

migrations.name: profiles
streaks
achievements
quiz_scores
question_attempts
handle_new_user_trigger
leaderboard_view
migrations.sql:
CREATE VIEW public.leaderboard_scores WITH (security_invoker = true) AS
SELECT 
  p.username,
  p.avatar_emoji,
  SUM(qs.score) as total_score,
  AVG(qs.percentage) as avg_percentage,
  COUNT(qs.id) as quiz_count
FROM public.profiles p
LEFT JOIN public.quiz_scores qs ON qs.user_id = p.id
GROUP BY p.id, p.username, p.avatar_emoji
ORDER BY total_score DESC NULLS LAST;
